[{"Name":"Petr Trávník","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgcVXOgN_rGB_pQGvuEFX3Fq7M2MHtgoTm3vqunSNvA5yGitM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We’ve been in contact with this company since April 2025, finalized our quote and paid the deposit on June 6th, with a clear agreement that the full roofing and exterior siding job would be completed during the summer.
As of mid-November, the roof and exterior insulation have finally been done — but the siding installation still hasn’t even started. Despite repeated promises from their representative to provide a firm installation date or at least proof that the siding materials were ordered, we’ve received no updates, no timeline, and no accountability.
Communication has been very difficult throughout — constant excuses, missed follow-ups, and no proactive effort to resolve delays. With winter now setting in, we are genuinely worried about potential weather damage to our newly renovated house due to the unfinished exterior.
Unfortunately, based on our experience, I would not recommend this company to anyone looking for reliable timelines or professional communication.

Mar 2026 update:

The siding portion of our project was formally cancelled in November 2025, and a refund (20k+) was requested for the uncompleted work. As of March 2026, the matter remains unresolved and the deposit has not been returned.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James Young","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUL0OivziS9s1T1jRQVbJwrOgZ3e3D8NS46MsCrJ5m4yXDLpiY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Replaced asphalt shingles on  1100 sq. ft. bungalow.

The couple of times that I got a hold of Dale, he said that they would be out within a few days to do the roof. Approximately 4 months later, several more messages with no call back and still no date to install the roof. If they were not interested or too busy to do the roof, they should have let me know so that I could make other arrangements instead of leaving me in limbo. Finally got fed up and contacted On Time Roofing on Thursday July 24th and they are here today, Tuesday, July 29th completing the roof work. 5 days later which is amazing.

Anyways the roof was eventually completed and since that time we have lost shingles on 2 separate occasions since the roof was done only 3 years ago. From initial visit and explaining what was needed through the installation, Jay and his team were professional and the end product is amazing! Very happy with the how it turned out and would highly recommend them for your roof or exterior needs. Couple of pics attached of the final product!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC1KTCBCs5w6-9nnhctuWX2&fid=0x0:0x3034c67fcc664e9d"],"When":"2025-7-15"},{"Name":"Kelly Nadeau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7AxjUQ1pDrjXfdJXHBKVVN3E94J1lbmkpVT9QnKHpflXBqXEF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"You’re going to feel like you won the contractor lottery if you get this company to do work for you. They put the humanity, pride, and exceptional work back into an industry that is full of crooked corner-cutters. Jay made the impossible possible for me with a circa 1834 2-storey carriage house that was a few seasons away from collapse.

I initially contacted him about replacing the roof in hopes of slowing the deterioration, but he explained how it would cost me more in the long-term to put a new roof on a structurally unsound building, and then he worked with me to make it financially possible to restore it. And THEN he juggled the extra time it would take into his already busy schedule to get it all done!

Jay and his crew are honest and genuine. They take great pride in doing a proper job, they blow expectations out of the water, and they’re a pleasure to have around. They worked with all the old beams and floorboards that they could, raised one corner 18 inches to realign it (!!!), and repurposed pieces to keep some of the history intact. There was a mind-boggling sag in the roof that would have taken a miracle to correct — and they did it.

I’ve been brought to grateful tears more than once when I’ve stepped outside and looked over to see how beautiful that old building is now. The restoration of old barns is not something everyone does. I’ve seen the amount of work it takes and I will always be grateful that I discovered Jay, Derek, Don, and Mark. They do it in excellence, with good cheer, and for all the right reasons.

I’ve been delaying posting this review because I don’t want them to get so busy they can’t come back to work on our summer kitchen and attached wood shed in the near future, but it’s starting to feel selfish.

You won’t find a better company to do your steel roofing, barn restoration or repairs, eaves, siding, decks, or anything else they offer.

Thanks so much, guys, for who you are, what you do, and how you do it. I look forward to working with you again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC31cWA_QE&fid=0x0:0x3034c67fcc664e9d"],"When":"2024-11-7"},{"Name":"G H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW11pYQyilgd3FEWFHINOhkLr7RJoS9Ic0faB6m1nwqBcxHSWxq3w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jay and the Barnall guys did a great job installing our steel roofing and eaves trough in a very timely manner and great clean up afterwards. I would recommend Barnall to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shirley Dowson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXFYyQnRkefHdn2xLK4q01s_4EGrN_botDqNXPDc5y7BfpZJU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are pleased beyond our dreams of how our old barn transformed into a treasure that will be around now for generations. We would definitely refer them to any of our friends and family!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrew Zeitoun","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYOMwfciRQIXL9zyB_WAUI1LfywoVlzIlJjEUNNI3GDcejwVja=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jay and the team at Barn'ALL were great to work with and I'd recommend them without hesitation.

Their pricing was great, and as they worked through the job and uncovered more issues, they were more than generous with the extra help and extra effort they put in to make the job right.

Even though the weather was unpredictable and unhelpful, Jay kept in contact and was never more than a few hours away from returning a phone call or text message... and that's rare. Thanks Jay!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Howard Herscovici","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIk2ycbHRZlFHaODhf_7oO9QCWX0HCrADBKqzEkGuE-EzkhNg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had Jay and the crew here for almost 3 weeks working on our late 19th Century barn. The team had a variety of skills and worked exceptionally well together.  Along with replacing hundreds of barn boards they took care of a difficult roofing situation, put a new roof on our milkroom, added eavestrough and downspouts, replaced large areas of rotten flooring, constructing new beams in the process. title: Borchert's Roofing & General Contracting
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Lee Knuttila","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWdPD2yHl3pDgcmaao9Frkr_3UtphNZkoxqAs61BGPHLjkrkA0x6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We hired Borchert’s for three jobs: a steel roof on our garage, eaves/downspouts, and a repair of house shingles where we had a slow leak during big rainfalls.

Following the estimate, we had been given a window for installation which passed without communication and was met with confusion when I called to ask about getting the work done. Without warning they did start sending crews randomly over the next couple months. The best work they did was the steel roof on the garage, which besides not properly installing the drip edge over the facia (see photos), is standing up well and looks good.

The problems start with the eaves and downspouts. They screwed one downspout directly to a rain barrel despite us talking about the downspout connection at the estimate. It almost immediately blew over, leaving holes in the barrel and an eave hanging. On the house, three of the eaves were not angled to drain, so we had standing water. Two other eaves were positioned to drain water against a dormer rather than away from the house.

When I contacted about the water, they came back and still did not adjust them enough (see photos) to fully drain. Then over the course of the next three months, two of the other downspouts came off the house because of sloppy installation issues. Lastly, in several spots, we noticed that water was draining behind the eaves because of the installation (see photos).

But the ‘repair’ was actually the worst part. The first attempt was just slathering a seam with caulk, which did not work. When the leak got worse because of the way their eaves were now angled towards our dormer, we paid more for a section of new shingles, which again did not fix the leak. After a third failed attempt, we were so frustrated that we went to another company who did an absolutely great job and actually remarked “whoever did this work does not have much pride in their work” and “they did the fastest, cheapest work they could”.

Overall, would NOT recommend. Beyond the steel roof, the eaves were downspouts all required attention, repair, or alteration within months, they failed at the repair work, communication was non existent, and ultimately it required hiring another company to fix their mistakes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZlN6b4QE&fid=0x0:0x20495da5c6bbba61"],"When":"2023-9-4"},{"Name":"Brad Chapman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHdfYkp3uAdU3bkQrE4dUoSeEZXqcLMxyxAz2w5WrqN47t2geW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Borchert's Roofing came highly recommended from a friend & did an excellent job installing my steel roof & snow stops in 2 days in Picton, Ontario. I will recommend Borchert's to friends, coworkers & family in the future. I plan on having a new garage/2 bedroom built & will hire Borchert's again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-r-nPPQ&fid=0x0:0x20495da5c6bbba61"],"When":"2022-11-16"},{"Name":"Paul Armstrong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeCkduPV0cRqEo14vfKdCLqtI95howGGZ7YkFhRhwzQS2iARU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very happy with the new roof!

- Very competitive price.
- Quality materials used.
- Job started on scheduled date and finished in ONE day.
- Excellent installers who were extremely capable,  hard working, polite,
and professional.
- Thorough clean up of site upon completion.

I will continue using Borchert's Roofing for future residential roofing needs.

Armstrong Property Management","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICCv62XVg&fid=0x0:0x20495da5c6bbba61"],"When":"2020-9-9"},{"Name":"Jeff & Leah LaPlante","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXiDl7N2IGJUi4_GxP8THjRItPCidjyCRE5dhF7PGb7841qs-k=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"You will not go wrong with hiring this company! We were at a bit of a disadvantage because we have a family cottage in Shannonville but we don’t live in the area. We hired Borchert’s to do the work because they returned our calls promptly every time and seemed like a very reputable company. We are so happy we hired them!  They were amazing and they organized the fine details in the short time that we were there! They fit us into their busy schedule within two weeks time as they could see that we really needed a new roof! They sent pictures of the roof to show us what was happening since we couldn’t be there. All in all, we are so happy we went with this company!  Great price, amazing customer service and fantastic work! Thanks to the whole team!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"W3ndy72","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMlUT2Kw_T3oUyndXOEy25sYPd2rnQEspoq3ZqYXwgSAe7ENQp9A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had reached out to a few roofing companies, one did not get back to me at all, another replied saying they were booked til Spring so they had to turn us down, but Andrew responded right away and was ready to work with us. I would definitely recommend Borchert's Roofing to everyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUm9KsnLE6C4fLJxPYmZTV0JV1v7dfDeU_4wwtNjVkXmW0FQ6c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are very happy with Borchert's Roofing. I AM PAYING IN CONDO FEES for these type of "approved vendors?"  Someone needs to loose their license!  I HAD to post 1 star because Google would not let me post without a rating (which should be NO stars here)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Barb Hannemann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJD7KrHLWkXFckdE-YbBjcNUGgh1FOArvsZnnqlyIsjWwCHcg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Beware
My experience with French Brothers was horrible. After a storm they went on our roof to assess.  2 sections needing doing. Insurance company was involved. Then French Brothers went on the roof several weeks later to do a soft repair until they could do the major repair. This was suggested by the insurance company.
Here comes the PROBLEM. After being on the roof TWICE in the summer, in October they told me I needed to replace all the wood sheeting on the whole building before they could put on the shingles. Seriously, why didn’t you know this when you were on the roof TWICE BEFORE. We were screwed. Couldn’t get another roofer at that time (end of October)and also the insurance company has already paid them for the 2 sections. So I had to pay for all the new sheeting and half the roof.  I couldn’t get another quote, it was too late in the season. Winter was coming. I would have done that if I had of known of this problem when they FIRST went up in the summer at the beginning!!!.
So I had to Pay HUGE MONEY. They claimed they gave me a discount ????(I will never know)
I wish I could give them a -10. I have never felt so CHEATED.
I WOULD NEVER USE THEM AGAIN.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"J King","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKuVD1jquQ7c4JQLfCJ7fKSnDixQIyaaGD7iVPNKVOIiDmvBw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We have hired French Brothers 3 times.  The first time was a new flat roof on an apartment.  Mostly well done, I sealed some small holes that were missed myself and they came back to fix a vent which was accidentally coved over, however on one side of the building the water run off was not thought out so that we had difficulty installing a gutter.  The roof & gutter need to work together but this is not their problem according to them.  Second time the price was really high for the work done and was charged by the hour for a guy who left for a few hours and was not working for me.  Third time high price for a quick repair.  Will not be hiring again tired of the high price.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James Maple","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIRC5XMcnoofUM3nCcmMfQtXreyW25SKyhFlu3qgl_dVzW5Ow=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Did a great job replacing my flat roof. Thanks also to Team Sharon for ensuring we moved into an immaculately clean house!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDZy4X-yAE&fid=0x0:0xb9c1a7dc28fe67de"],"When":"2023-10-7"},{"Name":"Ernest Hofmann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5oKnZhEYHl9EyVFUk1TTc5iJARoPutQu2jrNeXyleAfd_zA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"When we decided to build our own home, we had several builders provide us an estimate based upon our design. We contacted several contractors and when pricing came back, we were left disappointed as all of them were way out of our budget. We were left to wonder if this dream would not be feasible, but  we sold our house and had little else to fall back on to get back in to the real estate market. Then we stumbled upon Absolute General Contractors.
Corey took our plans and came back with a budget that fit nicely within our means. The dream was back on. We were ecstatic. Our plans were sent to acquire necessary permits by Absolute and we began construction late September and were moved in by March. A reasonable amount of time considering building over the winter months amid Covid protocols. Corey’s team kept us on budget and completed the house perfectly. From the civil subcontractors, framers, mechanical, electrical and finish sub trades, the process went fairly smoothly.
Any cost over runs were the result of us adding to the scope. We have now been living here since March 2021 and thus far there have been no issues with the building envelope.
We would highly recommend Absolute for any of your contracting needs. Great team, quality construction and finishing. I should know, as I am an Architectural Technologist myself.
Thank you Corey, Michele and the rest of the Absolute team.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICmtMSoTw&fid=0x0:0xb9c1a7dc28fe67de"],"When":"2021-12-19"},{"Name":"Chad Henderson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIqzmUiX3z4j2a-1tie2606K4OOx30pAwaWYi_Kgk1mBbHuGw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We hired Absolute Contractors to re-do the siding, eaves trough, soffit and fascia on our house and garage. The Sales person, Chris, was professional, friendly and communicative.
He was excellent at returning our calls, answering our questions. He actually assisted us with the design for the new "curb side appeal" we were after. Thank you so much. We are very appreciative of all his hard work.

Absolute Contractors sent a crew over to begin the job. The guys were safety minded, friendly, polite, clean and efficient.

They cordoned off the sidewalk area (at the bottom of our stairs) for the safety of the public. The crew then supported and stabilized the porch roof, and tore out our old, decrepit cement pillars and landing/stairs and railings.
They built our new landing/stairs with grey pebble PVC decking and white aluminum railing.
Our design consisted of the  stairs being built toward driveway rather than sidewalk since we have an ageing parent that resides with us and we were concerned about his safety.
He has always felt uncomfortable being so close to the busy sidewalk and road, he now has a renewed confidence about leaving the house by the front door. Thank you for that!

Absolute Contractors made sure all the details were executed perfectly right down to the patio stones leading to the driveway along with the PVC skirting that hides the underpart of our landing that now faces the sidewalk.
The 3 of us are extremely satisfied and very appreciative of how Absolute Contractors went OVER AND ABOVE every step of they way!

They have definitely earned our respect and future business. Thank you Absolute Contractors!
You are ABSOLUTELY WONDERFUL!!!

sincerely,
Kim, Phil and Murray Howlett

title: Flawless Roofing
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"jim mcpeake","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQuh7x8jlnQIr4pdrJRvYae0c0fNX1HxFq5ffLB4nS0GqLz5I=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had some shingles come loose and fall off the house, so I did my research and contacted Flawless Roofing. I left a message, and Sterling, the owner, called me back within a couple of hours. He came by the next day—this guy really knows his product and was able to answer every question we had.

Originally, he estimated the job could be done around May or June, but with the weather looking iffy, he rearranged his schedule and was able to fit us in almost immediately. He said if he put his full team on it, they could get it done in just two days. The pricing was very fair for the quality of materials and workmanship.

His crew was respectful, hardworking, and focused—no long breaks, just solid work. The cleanup afterward was excellent, and the entire process was completed within 8 days.

I wouldn’t hesitate to use Sterling and his crew again, and I’ll definitely be recommending them to friends and family.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lauren Frantz-Reid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXp-9-064Oxm1Dq3l8PDY64Akt8cA0H7BRbT9dNW7woY0V8H84=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are currently building our home and I just have to say WOW!
